pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **"Mustard Boy's Saudi Arabia pick: like sproutin' goals from sand."** Devin's got Spain puttin' in work like they’re on a tapas tour, and Zach's hopin' that Saudi oil money translates to somethin’ more than just a dry midfield. I swear, Zach must think 'cause they’re from the desert, they’ll handle the heat down in Atlanta. But really, I reckon ‘Ghost Pepper’ is about to turn up the spice and serve up a soccer lesson. Spain’s gonna cook Saudi Arabia like a Texas BBQ, with all the sizzle and none of the mercy.markup

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe 'The Noisemaker' Edges Out Gayden in World Cup Rankings
pundit_takes.subtitle: 15-year-old savant finds success drafting three non-qualifying teams.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach 'Mustard Boy' Poised for Uncomfortable Clash with Devin's Spain
pundit_takes.subtitle: Hopes Saudi Arabia can match Spain's flair in upcoming match.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner 'Bubba G' Looks to Boost Rank with Egyptians
pundit_takes.subtitle: Egypt set to face New Zealand while sitting at third place.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden 'The Backpass Assassin' Struggles Despite Three Non-Qualifying Teams
pundit_takes.subtitle: Currently last, questions arise about his drafting strategies.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gayden's clutching the wooden spoon with one hand, family drama in the other.
Rafe's Tier-3 picks stronger than Gayden's Tier-1. Who's your daddy now?
Rafe schools Devin with a +6 head-to-head beatdown. High school hero!
Gunner slips as soon as Rafe joins the party. Coincidence? I think not.
